project.name: B站首页
project.styleDefinitionBrief: B站首页：粉色品牌主色调，信息密集型视频内容平台，活泼年轻化的视觉风格
project.designRead: video-platform / young users / playful energetic / information-dense / avoid generic card walls

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: Bilibili pink (#FF6699) used for primary CTA, active nav, brand accents
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single brand primary; no secondary/accent brand hues; identities/categories use neutral or primary tints

surfaceAndDepth.surfaceModel: white cards on gray-50 background; subtle shadows on cards; hover shadows deeper

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: sticky top header with logo + nav + search + user actions; category bar below header
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: PingFang SC / Microsoft YaHei sans-serif stack
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: white cards, gray-50 background, subtle card shadows
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: pink rounded-full buttons for primary; outlined pink for secondary
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: 1400px max-width centered content; grid layouts with gap-4/6

designSource.designDecisionSummary: B站品牌色粉色主色调，圆润活泼的设计风格，信息密集的视频内容布局

pages.title: 首页
pages.visualNorthStar: 活泼年轻化的视频内容发现页，以B站粉色为主色调，信息丰富但不拥挤
